entities.name: Folder policy
entities.context: A governing rule for managing folders

entities.name: global prefs
entities.context: User-specific preferences that apply across the system

entities.name: safety rules
entities.context: Safety regulations that might impact folder policies

entities.name: user
entities.context: The individual responsible for arbitration in conflicting rules

relationships.context: Folder policy takes precedence over global preferences
Conflicts escalate to user for resolution
Child policies are more specific and take precedence in conflicts
